entry.title: npm:chalk-tempalte (*)
entry.summary: Severity: high. Campaigns: Shai-Hulud typosquat clone (of chalk-template). Sources: Mondoo.

entry.title: npm:@mistralai/mistralai (2.2.3, 2.2.4, 2.2.2)
entry.summary: Severity: critical. Campaigns: Mini Shai-Hulud Mistral · OSV: Malicious code in @mistralai/mistralai (npm). Sources: TheHackerNews, OSV: MAL-2026-3432.

entry.title: npm:@opensearch-project/opensearch (3.6.2, 3.5.3, 3.8.0, 3.7.0)
entry.summary: Severity: critical. Campaigns: Mini Shai-Hulud TanStack · OSV: Malicious code in @opensearch-project/opensearch (npm). Sources: Snyk, OSV: MAL-2026-3434.

entry.title: npm:@tanstack/react-router (1.169.5, 1.169.8)
entry.summary: Severity: critical. Campaigns: Mini Shai-Hulud TanStack · OSV: Malicious code in @tanstack/react-router (npm). Sources: Snyk, StepSecurity, OSV: MAL-2026-3465.

entry.title: npm:@tanstack/router-core (1.169.5, 1.169.8)
entry.summary: Severity: critical. Campaigns: Mini Shai-Hulud TanStack · OSV: Malicious code in @tanstack/router-core (npm). Sources: Snyk, OSV: MAL-2026-3473.
